title: RSM [Really Scary Modpack]
description: This is a modpack that scares you with its atmosphere
body:
This modpack is designed to deliver a deeply immersive horror experience within the familiar world of Minecraft—without overwhelming you with overpowered mobs or constant combat. Instead, it builds tension through atmosphere, psychological unease, and enhanced character immersion.

**Key Features**:

**Gradually Escalating Horror**: The world becomes increasingly unnerving as you progress. Subtle changes, eerie audio, and environmental storytelling work together to create a creeping sense of dread.

**Deep Player Immersion**: Feel truly connected to your in-game character. Through carefully chosen mods, your movements, reactions, and surroundings feel more lifelike than ever.

**Enhanced Animations**: Improved animations bring your character—and the world around you—to life in a more realistic and expressive way.

Horror Mods (No Spoilers): We’ve curated a selection of horror-focused mods that heighten suspense and fear without spoiling the experience. Discover the horrors on your own.

Stunning World Atlas: Explore a beautifully crafted world enhanced by shaders and a carefully selected texture pack. Beauty and horror go hand in hand here.


**Recommended Settings:**

Play in singleplayer, with headphones, and lights off for full immersion.

Use shaders and texture packs to bring out the modpack’s full visual potential.


If you're seeking a horror-themed Minecraft experience that leans into psychological tension, immersive visuals, and atmospheric storytelling, this modpack is for you.
